openrouter_api_key.description: API Key for OpenRouter AI service (if empty, uses .env)

ai_model_id.description: ID of the AI model to use (OpenRouter model id)

ai_model_name.description: Display name of the AI model shown in the app

ai_api_base_url.description: Base URL for AI API endpoint

azure_tts_api_key.description: API Key for Azure Text-to-Speech service (if empty, uses .env)

azure_tts_region.description: Region for Azure Text-to-Speech service (e.g., eastus)

github_api_key.description: GitHub API Key for AI service (if empty, uses .env)

min_app_version.description: Minimum required app version for force update

latest_app_version.description: Latest available app version for optional update notification

android_store_url.description: Google Play Store URL for update redirection

ios_store_url.description: App Store URL for update redirection
